title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Hymn to Nidaba
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Hymn to Nidaba.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Hymn to Nidaba.

translation.text: From 'Hymn to Nidaba': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
